reviews.review_title: Don’t play if you have arachnophobia.
reviews.review_description: Brother, I got this demo to try out a doom rip off, I didn’t sign up to get bombarded BY HAIRY TARANTULAS EVERYWHERE

Great mechanics, fun and addictive gameplay! This demo was perfect to try out the game as I was on the fence and now I will definitely buy the full game. I easily got past the first boss and now I want to see more! Hoping the full game has tougher bosses and it becomes more strategic. I really like how each run feels very different with all the different upgrades, this is very important for a true rougelite.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for the feedback and for supporting us, every bit matters :)

We are so glad you had fun playing our demo!

If you have more questions, join our Discord. You should find the link, e.g., on our YouTube page :)

reviews.review_description: The fast pace of the game is great! I only played the demo but I'm definitely buying the full version. Well worth checking out!

reviews.review_description: When the game coming out I cant find it

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for the feedback! You can already get the game in Early access. Search for "Plasmaborne". The full release is planned for March 2026. 

If you have more questions, join our Discord. You should find the link, e.g. on our youtube page :)
